ORB window was anchored to Globex session start (6pm ET Sunday), not 9:30 AM ET Monday. Your chart uses CME Globex 24h template (confirmed by the 4:58-5:02pm flatten window at line 874). This meant orbH/orbL were being computed over Sunday evening bars, and ORBBreak/ORBRetest would fire against wrong levels during RTH. Fixed — ORB now explicitly anchored to the 9:30 ET bar (tMin=570), with separate orbBars counter decoupled from sessBars. Plus session-start invalidates stale ORB so overnight SweepFade can't trigger off yesterday's ORB levels.
